metadata.landingDescription: A calm buffer between browsing and forgetting. Save anything in one keystroke. Rediscover it naturally, when it matters again.
metadata.privacyDescription: How Slate handles your memory. Local-first by default, no tracking, always exportable.

hero.subtitle: Slate is a calm buffer between browsing and forgetting. Save anything in one keystroke. Rediscover it naturally, when it matters again.

initial: How Linear thinks about engineering velocity
On craft and the cost of caring too much
heroItems.incoming: Local-first software — the new old way

closingCta.sub: Slate will remember it for you. Free forever for capture, search, and archive.

privacy.lede: Slate is built on a simple premise: the things you save are yours. By default, your data stays on your device and we collect as little as possible — today, that's nothing at all.

local.title: Local by default
local.sub: Your saves live in your browser. Nothing is shipped to any server we run.

noTracking.title: No tracking
noTracking.sub: No analytics SDKs, no cookies, no behavioural data. We don't watch you use Slate.

exportable.title: Always exportable
exportable.sub: Your saves belong to you. One click to clean JSON or CSV — no lock-in, no holdout.

principles.label: Principles
principles.intro: Slate is built on a small number of opinions that constrain every product decision below.

bullets.text: Your saves are yours, stored in your browser, on your device. There is no hosted cloud today.
If we don't need a piece of data to make Slate work for you, we don't collect it.
We do not run ads. We do not sell, rent, or share your saves with third parties.
We do not use your saves or personal data to train AI models.
Privacy-friendly settings are the defaults. We don't dark-pattern you out of them.

collect.label: What we collect
collect.intro: By default, we do not collect or process your data. Slate does not require an account, does not phone home, and does not run analytics on this website.

onDevice.label: On your device
items: URLs and titles of pages you save
Tags, notes, and collections you create
Timestamps and which list an item is in

neverCollected.label: Never collected
items: The contents of pages you didn't save
Keystrokes, mouse movement, or screen recordings
Inferred interests, topics, or behavioural profiles

storage.label: Where your data lives
storage.p1Start: Slate is built on a local-first architecture. Your library lives in
storage.p1End: inside your browser. That copy is the source of truth — and the only copy today.
storage.p2: There is currently no hosted sync, backend account system, or shared cloud storage operated by Slate.
storage.p3: Because your data is local, it may persist on your device even after you stop using Slate. You can wipe it at any time from Settings, or by clearing site data in your browser.

analytics.label: Analytics & tracking
analytics.p1: Slate does not use advertising, behavioural analytics, or tracking SDKs. We do not track your behaviour, usage patterns, or interactions inside the app.
analytics.p2: The website does not use cookies for tracking or advertising purposes.

integrations.label: Optional integrations
integrations.p1: In the future, Slate may support optional bring-your-own integrations such as personal sync providers, cloud storage, or AI services selected and connected by you.
integrations.p2: These integrations will always be optional and clearly labelled before any data leaves your device.
integrations.p3: If you choose to connect a third-party provider, the data required for that feature may be transmitted to that provider at your request.
integrations.p4: The handling of your data by third-party providers is governed by their own privacy policies and practices.
integrations.p5: Slate does not control or take responsibility for how third-party services process data you voluntarily choose to share with them.

sharing.label: Sharing & third parties
sharing.p1: We do not sell, rent, or share your data with advertisers or data brokers.
sharing.p2: There is currently no payment processor, hosted backend, advertising network, or external AI provider receiving your saved content.
sharing.p3: If third-party services are added in the future, we will clearly list what data they receive and why before those features are released.

rights.label: Your rights
rights.intro: Slate is designed so that exercising your rights doesn't require an email — most of them are available directly in the app.

bullets.text: Download all your saves as JSON or CSV at any time.
Wipe your local library from Settings, or clear site data in your browser.
Everything Slate knows about you is visible directly in the app.
Edit any field on any save directly in the app.

rights.closing: If you're in the EU, UK, or California, you may have additional rights under GDPR, UK GDPR, or CCPA respectively. Since your data is primarily stored locally, many of these rights can be exercised directly by you.

children.label: Children
children.p1: Slate is not directed at children under 13, or under 16 in the European Union where applicable. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children in those age groups.

changes.label: Changes to this policy
changes.p1: If we make significant changes — especially changes that expand data collection or introduce external services — we will update the date above and clearly communicate those changes before they take effect.
changes.p2: We do not silently expand data collection.

contact.title: Questions?
contact.body: Plain prose, no ticket forms. Reach a human and we'll get back to you within a few days.
contact.controller: Data controller: Mikuláš Vojíř, Czech Republic.
